site.name: Applied Intelligence
site.description: Applied Intelligence is a clear, public framework overview of specialized agents that improve operations, quality, communication, and business outcomes.
site.corePrinciple: One ecosystem. Separate agents. Clear roles.

repository.name: applied-intelligence-website
repository.role: Public website and framework shell for the Applied Intelligence ecosystem
repository.purpose: Acts as the production website source for the public-facing Applied Intelligence framework presentation.

agentCards.title: AI-Trace
agentCards.subtitle: Trace
agentCards.tagline: AI-Trace exposes repeat problems, hidden cost, quality risk, and lost hours so recurring issues stop being patched and start being fixed.
agentCards.principle: AI-Trace shows the picture clearly. AI-CIS fixes what the picture reveals.

agentCards.title: AI-CIS
agentCards.subtitle: CIS
agentCards.tagline: AI-CIS captures process breakdowns, protects flow, and drives corrective action before repeat issues become normal.

agentCards.title: AI-ROI
agentCards.subtitle: ROI
agentCards.tagline: AI-ROI turns validated improvements and equipment opportunities into clear financial justification, showing where capacity, labor, and value can be gained.
agentCards.principle: AI-CIS finds the improvement. AI-ROI justifies the value.

agentCards.title: AI-Case
agentCards.subtitle: Case
agentCards.tagline: AI-Case turns real improvements, technical problem-solving, and process wins into clear case studies.
agentCards.principle: AI-CIS identifies case study value. AI-Case tells the story.

agentCards.title: AI-Quote
agentCards.subtitle: Quote
agentCards.tagline: AI-Quote turns weld, grind, fixture, and flow decisions into clear estimating logic and practical pricing.

agentCards.title: AI-RMA
agentCards.subtitle: RMA
agentCards.tagline: AI-RMA traces failures back to the source, contains risk, and drives permanent correction instead of repeat damage.

agentCards.title: AI-Connect
agentCards.subtitle: Connect
agentCards.tagline: AI-Connect prepares the right people with the right information before action is needed.
agentCards.principle: Nothing important gets lost between people, departments, or decisions.

agentCards.title: Document Formatter
agentCards.subtitle: Formatter
agentCards.tagline: The Document Formatter turns finished outputs into clean, branded documents ready for review, print, or portfolio use.
agentCards.principle: The Document Formatter formats finished outputs cleanly without changing the underlying logic.

homepage.intent: Simplified homepage structure with clearer hierarchy and less visual density.

hero.headline: Built from the floor up.
hero.supportingText: One ecosystem. Separate agents. Clear roles.

sections.title: Core Active Agents
sections.description: Highlight active agents first to reduce cognitive load on first visit.

sections.title: Planned Expansion
sections.description: Show planned modules as future roadmap context, not primary homepage focus.

sections.title: Supporting Utility
sections.description: Keep supporting utility visible but separate from core flow.

layoutNotes: Prioritize whitespace and card breathing room.
Keep top navigation clean and glass-light.
Avoid stacked dense copy blocks on homepage.
